sourceTitle: Acceptable Use of Generative AI Tools | UT Austin Information Security Office
evidenceSnippetOriginal: AI tools that lack a university contract and appropriate data-sharing controls are not approved for use with Controlled or Confidential university information. This includes free or non-UT-managed versions of AI tools like ChatGPT and Copilot.
rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
